global.retrying_answer_submission_check_network: Izama ukungenisa impendulo ... Jonga inethiwekhi yakho ...
global.check_webgl_description: Kubonakala ngathi isikhangeli sakho asiyixhasi iWebGL. Sebenzisa ikhonkco elingezantsi ukusombulula lo mba.
global.expiry_alert_title: Ikhowudi yakho yokubhalisa sele iza kuphelelwa
global.expiry_alert_text: Ikhowudi yakho yobhaliso iyaphelelwa kungekudala ({daysValue} iintsuku eziseleyo). Emva kokuphelelwa yisikhathi, awusayi kuba nakho ukufikelela kwiakhawunti yakho. Nceda uqhagamshelane nomphathi wakho weqela okanye umhlohli ukuze ufunde indlela yokufikelela okwandisiweyo.
global.under_maintenance_message: Ngoku senza ulungiso olucwangcisiweyo ukuphucula amava akho.
global.under_maintenance_description: Nceda ujonge kamva. Siyaxolisa ngayo nayiphi na ingxaki.
global.injector_activity_directions: Nceda ugcwalise umahluko kunye neesirinji zetyuwa nganye ngemithamo efanelekileyo efunekayo ukwenza olu viwo lwe- {bodyPartName} . Nje ukuba imiqulu ikhethiwe, khetha iqhosha elithi "ELANDELAYO" ukuze uqhubeke.
global.patient_position_directions: Nceda ukhethe indawo yesigulana ongathanda ukuyenza ukuze wenze olu viwo lwe- {bodyPartName} . Nje ukuba indawo ikhethiwe, khetha iqhosha elithi "ELANDELAYO" ukuqhubeka.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Ukusebenzisa i-laser kunye namaqhosha okukhangela, nceda uhambise isigulane kunye netafile kwindawo onqwenela ukuyiphawula kwindawo yendawo ngaphakathi kolu viwo lwe {bodyPartName} kwaye ukhethe "Qinisekisa iLandmark". Nje ukuba indawo ephawulweyo ikhethiwe, khetha iqhosha elithi "ELANDELAYO" ukuze uqhubeke.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Indawo oyikhethileyo yesigulana ayichanekanga.  Nceda wenze ukhetho lwakho olulandelayo kwizigulana ezinokubakho ezidweliswe ngezantsi.
global.delete_all_point_selection: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima zonke iingongoma ezikhethiweyo?
global.delete_all_sat_band: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima yonke indawo yebhendi?
global.set_scan_description: Ukuba unqwenela ukusebenzisa indlela ethi "Seta ukulibazisa" ukumisela ixesha lesigaba, Nceda ufake ulibaziseko lokuskena kwimibuzo oyifunayo ngesandla.
global.is_contrast_duration_greater_than_scan_d: Ubude beSkena (I-UI) ayinakuba nkulu kunexesha lothelekiso (i-UI yesitofu).
global.is_contrast_duration_longer_than_scan_du: Ubude bomthelekiso abunakuba ngaphezu kwemizuzwana emi-5 ubude kunobude beskeni.
global.image_duration_shorter_than_contrast_dur: Ubude bomfanekiso ngokuchasene nobude bexesha lochasaniso.
global.create_new_profile: Ngaba uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukwenza inkangeleko entsha?
global.save_all_patient_positions: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukugcina zonke izithuba zesigulane kuwo onke amalungu omzimba wemodeli ekhethiweyo?
global.delete_selected_digital_localizer: Ngaba uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima isilungelelanisi sedijithali esikhethiweyo?

Kuyo yonke le migaqo nemiqathango yokusetyenziswa, amagama athi “wena” kunye “nowakho” abhekisa kumsebenzisi ondwendwela iSiza. Le migaqo kunye nemiqathango yokusetyenziswa ("iMigqaliselo yokuSebenzisa") ibeka imigaqo ebophelelayo ngokusemthethweni ekusebenziseni kwakho iSayithi. Le Miqathango yokuSebenzisa isebenza kwiWebhsayithi yethu okanye nayiphi na enye inkonzo ye-intanethi ye-MST okanye isicelo esifaka ikhonkco kule Miqathango yokuSebenzisa, kunye nazo naziphi na iimpawu, iiwidgits, iiplagi, umxholo, izinto ezikhutshelweyo okanye ezinye iinkonzo ezibonelelwayo, okanye ezinye iinkonzo ze-intanethi ze-MST okanye usetyenziso (ngokuhlangeneyo, “iSite”). Le Miqathango yokuSetyenziswa iya kusebenza nokuba ufikelela njani okanye usebenzisa iSayithi, nokuba usebenzisa ikhompyuter, ithebhulethi, isixhobo esiphathwayo, iwotshi ehlakaniphile, ikhonsoli, okanye ngenye indlela. Naziphi na izicelo eziphathwayo ezithumela ikhonkco kweli phepha. Ukuba awuvumelani nayo nayiphi na le Miqathango yokusebenzisa okanye uMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala, nceda ungasebenzisi iSayithi kwaye uphume ngoku.

Ufanele ufunde uMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala ngononophelo ngaphambi kokuba usebenzise iSayithi lethu ekubeni, ngokusebenzisa iSiza, uya kuvumelana nayo yonke into kule Miqathango yokuSetyenziswa, kubandakanywa nemigaqo equlethwe kuMgaqo-nkqubo wethu waBucala.

TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms_description: Singongeza, sihlaziye, sicime okanye silungise iSayithi nangaliphi na ixesha ngokubona kwethu. Sigcina ilungelo, nangaliphi na ixesha kwaye amaxesha ngamaxesha, ngaso nasiphi na isizathu, ukutshintsha iMigqaliselo yokusetyenziswa. Singathumela okanye sibonise izaziso zotshintsho kwiMigqaliselo yokuSetyenziswa kwiSayithi okanye sinokukwazisa ngolo tshintsho. Nje ukuba ithunyelwe, olu tshintsho kwiMigaqo yokuSetyenziswa lusebenza kwangoko. Ukuba naluphi na utshintsho esilwenzayo alwamkelekanga kuwe, khawuleza uyeke ukusebenzisa iSiza. Nakuphi na ukusetyenziswa nguwe kwiSayithi emva kokuba naluphi na utshintsho kwiMiqathango yethu yokuSebenzisa lusebenza luya kubonisa isivumelwano sakho kolo tshintsho. Kuya kufuneka ubuyele rhoqo kwaye ujonge le Miqathango yokuSetyenziswa ukuze wazi awona malungelo kunye nezibophelelo ezisebenzayo kwisivumelwano sakho nathi. Akukho nto kule Miqathango yokuSebenzisa enikezela ngawo nawaphi na amalungelo omntu wesithathu okanye izibonelelo kuwe.
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use_description: Le Miqathango yokuSetyenziswa isebenza kubo bonke abasebenzisi beSiza. Sinikezela ngoMxholo weSiza (ochazwe ngezantsi) njengembeko kubasebenzisi bethu kwaye sinenjongo yokuba uwonke, ulwazi kunye neenjongo zemfundo kuphela. Lonke ulwazi oluvela kule Site lunokutshintsha ngaphandle kwesaziso. Sikuvumela ukuba ufikelele kwaye usebenzise iSiqulatho seSayithi ngeenjongo zobuqu, ezingezizo ezentengiso kuphela kwaye ngokwenjenjalo sikunika imvume yokukhuphela kunye nokuprinta uMxholo weSayithi ngeenjongo zokubukela, ukufunda, kunye nokugcina izinto ezingezizo urhwebo, ukusetyenziswa kwemfundo. Nakuphi na okunye ukukopa, ukusasazwa, ukuthunyelwa kwakhona, okanye ukuguqulwa koMxholo weSayithi, nokuba kunge-elektroniki okanye ngenye indlela, akuvumelekanga ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliweyo yangaphambili. Uyavuma ukuba awuyi kuqhaqha, udibanise, uguqule injineli okanye uguqule uMxholo weSayithi, nayiphi na into kule Site okanye isofthiwe yeSayithi. Nakuphi na ukusetyenziswa okungagunyaziswanga okanye okuthintelweyo kunokubeka umenzi-mthetho kubutyala boluntu kunye nokutshutshiswa ngolwaphulo-mthetho phantsi kwemithetho esebenzayo.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description1: Ukusebenzisa iimpawu ezithile zeSayithi unokufuna ukwenza igama lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha. Ukuba ifuneka kuphawu lweSiza, i-MST iya kukwenzela igama eliyimfihlo kwaye uya kucelwa ukuba wenze igama lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha. Unoxanduva lwalo naluphi na unxibelelwano kunye neSayithi olwenzeka ngeakhawunti yakho, kungakhathaliseki ukuba ukusetyenziswa okunjalo akugunyaziswanga okanye ngumntu wesithathu. Nceda ugcine igama lakho lomsebenzisi kunye negama lokugqitha likhuselekile kwaye ungavumeli nabani na ukuba asebenzise ulwazi lweakhawunti yakho ukufikelela kwiSayithi.

Iilayisensi zeScanLab azivumelekanga ukuba kwabelwane ngazo ukuze zisetyenziswe ngeendlela ezininzi. Ilayisensi yeScanLab ayivumelekanga ukuba isetyenziswe njengendlela yokufundisa okanye yokufundisa ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliweyo yeScanLab. Nakuphi na ukwaphulwa kwale migaqo kuya kubangela ukuba kuthathwe amanyathelo asemthethweni kunye nokupheliswa kokusetyenziswa kunye neenkonzo kwangoko.
